creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Wed Sep 19 07:46:58 2012
New Revision: 304487
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304487

Log:
  This port adds the Carrier Weight Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		171457
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net>

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:43:48 2012	(r304486)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:46:58 2012	(r304487)
@@ -110,6 +110,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_percentage
+    SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_weight
     SUBDIR += trytond_company
     SUBDIR += trytond_company_work_time
     SUBDIR += trytond_country

Added: head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:46:58 2012	(r304487)
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	trytond_carrier_weight
+# Date created:		08 September, 2012
+# Whom:			Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_carrier_weight
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Carrier Weight Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_product_measurements>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_product_measurements \
+		trytond_carrier>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_carrier
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 07:46:58 2012	(r304487)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_carrier_weight-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 42c10c58916fe98c020402ba92efc909e6594c5898e4bf8851a5f3aafee3472c
+SIZE (trytond_carrier_weight-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 22242

Added: head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_carrier_weight/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 07:46:58 2012	(r304487)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Carrier Weight Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
